summary: Mantine 7 dependencies, theme files, provider wiring, and frontend build all validate against the Phase 4 foundation contract.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Mantine dependencies installed
checks.actual: All four dependencies are present in frontend/package.json.

checks.name: CHECK-02: Central status map exists
checks.actual: theme/status.ts defines uppercase STATUS_MAP and normalization/color helpers.

checks.name: CHECK-03: Theme object exported
checks.actual: theme/index.ts exports createTheme-based appTheme with typography, spacing, radius, shadows, and component defaults.

checks.name: CHECK-04: ThemeProvider mounted
checks.expected: Provider and notification host wired in main.tsx
checks.actual: ThemeProvider mounts MantineProvider + Notifications and main.tsx wraps App with it.

checks.name: CHECK-05: Frontend build passes
checks.actual: Build succeeded during CP1 and again after final verification.
